channel.title: Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: Thesis project
item.description: Thesis project: Dynamic 3D chromatin architecture of active and inactive regions and gene regulation of Drosophila under heat stress if load the figures slowly, please click the link to read its pdf format Fig.1 and Fig.S1 (Experiment design and good data quality) The experiment design (Fig.1A) High reproducibility (Fig.1B,C,D and Fig.S1A,C) Typical heat shock related genes are up-regulated (Fig.1D and Fig.S1B) Fig1 FigS1 Fig.2 and Fig.S2 (The most interesting features blocks in H3K27me3 and stripes in H3K27ac are found through loop analysis) Loop analysis indicates there is something interesting(Fig.
